summary: Good recording with distant audience chatter; Mission in the Rain shines despite background talking
review: The reviewer rates the tape very well, noting clear and pleasant sound that lets the gorgeous performance of "Mission in the Rain" come through. The only drawback is a persistent talker whose voice is far enough away to be mostly filtered out, even though they return for the encore.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review; it praises the recording quality and a standout song while noting minor talk‑over issues, leading to an overall positive but modest rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear sound with distant background talking throughout most of the set; chatter fades later but returns for the encore, yet remains far enough away to be mostly screened out.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; only the highlighted Mission in the Rain is mentioned positively.
